revision.text:
[[en:Government-General of Chōsen]][[ja:朝鮮総督府]][[ko:조선총독부]][[zh:朝鲜总督府]] {{Infobox government agency | agency_name = {{ill|Government-General of Korea|ja|朝鮮総督府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Government-General of Korea|qq=}} | nativename = {{ruby-ja|{{kyujitai|'''朝鮮總督府'''}}|ちょうせんそうとくふ}} | native_name_a = {{ruby|{{lang|ko|朝鮮總督府}}|{{lang|ko|조선총독부}}}} | seal = Seal of the Government-General of Korea.svg | seal_size = 200px | logo = Japanese General Government Building.jpg | logo_size = 250px | logo_caption = Government-General of Korea Building | chief1_name = [[:en:Masatake Terauchi|Masatake Terauchi]] (First)
{{ill|Nobuyuki Abe|en|Nobuyuki Abe|qid=Q315574|lt=Nobuyuki Abe|1=Nobuyuki Abe}} (Last) | chief1_position = [[#List of Governors-General of Korea|Governor-General]] | chief2_name = [[:en:Isaburo Yamagata|Isaburo Yamagata]] (First)
[[Ryūsaku Endō]] (Last) | chief2_position = [[Government-General of Korea#Senior Officials|Director of Civil Administration]] | parent_department = [[Government of Japan]] | child1_agency = [[Office of the Governor-General of Korea|Office of the Governor-General]], [[Financial Bureau of Korea|Financial Bureau]], [[Agriculture and Commerce Bureau of Korea|Agriculture and Commerce Bureau]], [[Mining and Industry Bureau of Korea|Mining and Industry Bureau]], [[Judicial Bureau of Korea|Judicial Bureau]], [[Education Bureau of Korea|Education Bureau]], [[Police Bureau of Korea|Police Bureau]] | child2_agency = [[Central Council of Korea|Central Council]], [[Communications Bureau of Korea|Communications Bureau]], [[Railway Bureau of Korea|Railway Bureau]], [[Administrative Divisions of Korea under Japanese Rule|Provinces]], [[Court System of Korea under Japanese Rule|Courts]] | headquarters = [[Keiki-dō (Japanese rule period)|Keiki-dō]]{{ill|Keijō|en|Keijō|qid=Q483984|lt=Keijō|1=Keijō}} | latitude = 37.577361 | longitude = 126.976861 | established = [[August 29, 1910]] ([[Meiji]] 43) | dissolved = [[September 12, 1945]] ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|qid=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 20) | preceding1 = [[Residency-General of Korea|Residency-General of Korea]] }} '''Government-General of Korea''' ({{lang|ja|朝鮮総督府}}, {{oldstyle|'''朝鮮總督府'''}}; {{Kor|k=조선총독부|hanja=朝鮮總督府}}) was a government agency established on August 29, 1910, to administer {{ill|Korea under Japanese rule|en|Korea under Japanese rule|qid=Q503585|lt=Korea under Japanese rule|1=Korea under Japanese rule}} following the [[:en:Japan–Korea Annexation Treaty|Japan–Korea Annexation Treaty]] {{ill|Empire of Japan|en|Empire of Japan|qid=Q188712|lt=Empire of Japan|1=Empire of Japan}} Law [{{NDLDC|2951509}} ''Ordinance No. 319 on the Establishment of the Government-General of Korea''], [[National Printing Bureau (Japan)|National Printing Bureau]], August 29, Meiji 43, [[Official Gazette (Japan)|Official Gazette]] Extra, p.6. [[:en:National Diet Library Digital Collections|National Diet Library Digital Collections]].. The August 29 ordinance was provisional, establishing only the Government-General and the Governor-General while temporarily maintaining the structure of the preceding [[Residency-General of Korea|Residency-General]]. The full administrative structure was implemented on October 1, 1910, following the September 30 enactment of the [[Government-General of Korea Ordinance]] {{ill|Empire of Japan|en|Empire of Japan|qid=Q188712|lt=Empire of Japan|1=Empire of Japan}} Law [{{NDLDC|2951536}} ''Ordinance No. 354 on the Government-General of Korea''], [[National Printing Bureau (Japan)|National Printing Bureau]], September 30, Meiji 43, [[Official Gazette (Japan)|Official Gazette]] Extra, p.1.. The Government-General was a reorganization of the [[Residency-General of Korea]], established under the {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|qid=Q233254|lt=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|1=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905}} "[https://www.jacar.go.jp/glossary/term2/0050-0020-0020.html Government-General of Korea, National Archives of Japan Digital Archive Center]". == List of Governors-General of Korea == === Governors-General === {| class="wikitable" |- ! No. !! Name !! Portrait !! Term Start !! Term End !! Rank / Later Position |- | 1st || [[:en:Masatake Terauchi|Masatake Terauchi]] || [[Image:Masatake Terauchi 2.jpg|100px]] || October 1, 1910 || October 14, 1916 || Field Marshal, Prime Minister of Japan |- | 2nd || [[:en:Yoshimichi Hasegawa|Yoshimichi Hasegawa]] || [[Image:Hasegawa Yoshimichi.jpg|100px]] || October 16, 1916 || August 12, 1919 || Field Marshal |- | 3rd || [[:en:Makoto Saitō|Makoto Saitō]] || [[Image:Saito_Makoto_1910.jpg|100px]] || August 13, 1919 || December 10, 1927 || Admiral, Prime Minister of Japan |} == See Also == * {{ill|Police Bureau of Korea|ja|朝鮮総督府警察|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Police Bureau of Korea|1=law enforcement in Japan under Japanese rule|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11517856}} * {{ill|Korean Military under Japanese Rule|ja|朝鮮軍人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Korean Military under Japanese Rule|1=Korean Military under Japanese Rule|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85881024}} * {{ill|Bank of Chōsen|en|Bank of Chōsen|qid=Q711604|lt=Bank of Korea under Japanese Rule|1=Bank of Chōsen}} == External Links == * [https://web.archive.org/web/20150927234943/http://www.kcn.ne.jp/~eijun/soutokuhu/soutokuhu.html Former Government-General of Korea] {{translated page|ja|朝鮮総督府}} [[ko:%EC%A1%B0%EC%84%A0%EC%B4%9D%EB%8F%85%EB%B6%80]] [[zh:%E6%9C%9D%E9%B2%9C%E6%80%BB%E7%9D%A3%E5%BA%9C]] [[ja:朝鮮総督府]] [[ko:조선총독부]] [[zh:朝鲜总督府]] [[ko:조선총독부]] [[zh:朝鲜总督府]] {{wikidata link|Q106234557}} [[Category:Buildings and structures demolished in 1995]] [[Category:Buildings and structures of Korea under Japanese rule]] [[Category:Former buildings in Seoul Metropolitan City]] [[Category:Georg de Lalandes]] [[Category:Government-General of Chōsen]] [[Category:Wikidata no English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
